sqlMap.select: SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN (select cn as cn from tbl_deptmaster where DEPT_CD_PATH like concat('%',#deptId#,'%') or (select deptid as cn from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId#)) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#) ) and folder.use_status = 'Y' or (folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' and folder.folder_type = #folderType# AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id =#comId# and folder.use_status = 'Y' ) order by folder.create_date
SELECT FOLDER_UPPER FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT type.TYPE_ICON , file.FILE_ID , file.FILE_NAME , file.FILE_PATH , file.FILE_SIZE , file.TYPE_ID , file.DOWN_COUNT , file.FILE_EXT , file.FOLDER_ID , file.USE_STATUS , file.CREATE_ID , file.CREATE_NAME1, file.CREATE_NAME2, file.CREATE_DATE , file.UPDATE_ID , file.UPDATE_DATE , file.TENANT_ID FROM (TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS file LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type ON type.TYPE_ID = file.TYPE_ID ) left join tbl_webfolder_folder folder on file.folder_id = folder.folder_Id WHERE file.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and file.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id = #comId#
folder.FOLDER_PATH like CONCAT ('|', #folderId#,'%')
folder.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
file.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchExt#, '%')
file.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#, '%')
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
file.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#, '%')
ORDER BY file.CREATE_DATE LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

select count(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT file.FILE_ID FROM (TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS file LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type ON type.TYPE_ID = file.TYPE_ID ) left join tbl_webfolder_folder folder on file.folder_id = folder.folder_Id WHERE file.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and file.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id = #comId#
folder.FOLDER_PATH like CONCAT ('|', #folderId#,'%')
folder.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
file.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchExt#), '%')
file.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#), '%')
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#), '%')
file.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#), '%')
ORDER BY file.CREATE_DATE
) as fileJoin

SELECT distinct folder_id as id ,if( folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder_upper )as parent, folder_name1 as text from tbl_webfolder_folder where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and USE_STATUS = 'Y' order by create_date

select distinct folder.FOLDER_ID as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.FOLDER_UPPER )as parent, folder.FOLDER_NAME1 as text from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.FOLDER_ID = user.FOLDER_ID where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER user on folder.FOLDER_ID = user.FOLDER_ID where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.use_status = 'Y' and user.USER_ID = #userId# and folder.OWNER_ID = #userId# ) and folder.FOLDER_TYPE= #folderType# AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# or (folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.use_status = 'Y' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and folder.OWNER_ID = #userId#) order by folder.create_date

select distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper )as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.use_status = 'Y' and (user.USER_ID IN (select cn as cn from tbl_deptmaster where DEPT_CD_PATH like concat('%',#deptId#,'%') or (select deptid as cn from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId#) and tenant_id = #tenantId#) ))
or (folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' and folder.folder_type = #folderType# AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and folder.OWNER_ID IN (select cn as cn from tbl_deptmaster where DEPT_CD_PATH like concat('%',#deptId#,'%') or (select deptid as cn from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId#) and tenant_id = #tenantId#) and folder.use_status = 'Y') order by folder.create_date
select * from jmocha.tbl_webfolder_folder where tenant_id = #tenant_id# and COMPANY_ID = #comId# and FOLDER_ID = #folderUppId# and folder_type = #folderType#
